finding: A reviewed pin manifest is insufficient unless workflow mutation is deterministic and uncovered mutable references fail closed.
design_implication: Use an exact textual applicator driven by the reviewed manifest, then run the independent action-reference audit before accepting workflow security evidence.

verification.adversarial_discovery: The initial detector missed list-form YAML uses entries and an uncovered owner/unknown@main reference; parser was corrected before evidence was recorded.
covered: absent reviewed refs do not create content

limits: The production and security workflows still contain mutable action references until the generated replacements are applied.
No Cloudflare deployment ran and no hostname or deployed commit was verified.
Release identity and signed commit binding do not prove upstream source or transitive dependencies are safe.
Cloudflare credentials remain external configuration blockers.
falsification_route: Run the applicator on both workflows, run audit-action-references.mjs over the generated files, and reject the change unless the independent audit reports zero mutable remote actions.
